{{Quote|It's a good thing for me these guys are sloppy. Karrde woulda had 'em shot.|Mara Jade|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''</ref>}}
'''Kaerobani's base''' was a fortress on [[Rathalay]] under the command of smuggling kingpin [[Kaerobani]], and acting base of the [[Lumini pirates/Legends|Lumini Pirates]].

==Design==
A vast complex, Kaerobani's base was constructed artistically, incorporating large amounts of moving water. Directly off from the main landing platform was a reflecting-pool with a waterfall, next to which was a small [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]]. Farther in, a massive waterfall overlooked the surrounding skyline, and within the base's heart was a large tank containing a trio of [[drugon]]s, as well as an observation deck. There was also, not far from the main gates, a large, enclosed, market complex.

Home to both Kaerobani's pirate operations and his personal artifact collection, the base boasted a complement of at least four [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] and a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|DX-9 transport]]. Some parts of the base were dedicated solely to the movement of cargo, including massive conveyer-belts and large [[Lifting claw|lift claws]].

===Museum===
{{Quote|This looks familiar...|Mara Jade upon discovering the head of [[8t88/Legends|8t88]] on display|<ref name="Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith" />}}
Of major note was Kaerobani's artifact gallery, showcasing the highlights of his collection. Containing the severed head of [[8t88/Legends|8t88]] as well as the head of a [[Phase II Dark Trooper/Legends|Phase II dark trooper]], it was here that he stored and displayed a stolen [[Holocron/Legends|Jedi holocron]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]]. Not far off from the main gallery was a somewhat smaller room, lined with what appeared to be tiles like those found in the [[Valley of the Jedi]].

==History==
In [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], Kaerobani's pirate agents raided a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|corvette]], stealing a valuable Jedi holocron. However, [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] was able to board the pirate vessel, and subsequently gained entrance to Kaerobani's base. She successfully infiltrated the installation, reacquired the holocron, and escaped, stealing one of the pirate craft.

==Behind the scenes==
Kaerobani's base is the site of an entire level of [[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]].

It is possible that a glitch in the game will have a weird looking stormtrooper helmet in place of [[8t88/Legends|8t88's]] head.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]''
